SRC-6AC734B5612D-BND: Communication boundary: Cloud admin action cannot proceed from incident pressure, teammate request, or old change notes; current change authority must close the exact boundary. The exact action boundary is: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: wrong service secret rotation.
